RibombeeDescription: A small yellow insectoid creature. It gathers honey and pollen overnight.
PollenPuffDescription: Pollen puffs are highly nutritious. There are many different varieties.
PollenPuffTulipDescription: A puff made from tulip pollen. Eating it will improve your farming temporarily.
PollenPuffBlueJazzDescription: A puff made from blue jazz pollen. Eating it will improve your fishing temporarily.
PollenPuffSweetPeaDescription: A puff made from sweet pea pollen. Eating it will improve your foraging temporarily.
PollenPuffSunflowerDescription: A puff made from sunflower pollen. Eating it will improve your luck temporarily.
PollenPuffSummerSpangleDescription: A puff made from summer spangle pollen. Eating it will improve your defense temporarily.
PollenPuffPoppyDescription: A puff made from poppy pollen. Eating it will improve your mining temporarily.
PollenPuffFairyRoseDescription: A puff made from fairy rose pollen. Eating it will improve your attack temporarily.
PollenPuffCrocusDescription: A puff made from crocus pollen. Eating it will improve your speed temporarily.
PollenTeaDescription: A soothing tea made from pollen puffs, tea leaves and a little bit of honey.
